case_title: NPC REALTY vs. TAI, DANIEL et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF NPC REALTY

CASE CALLED TO ORDER BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT, DANIEL TAI. WENDA CHENG, REPRESENTING NPC REALTY IS SWORN AND EXAMINED. COURT RULES IN FAVOR OF NPC REALTY FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 1517-20TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO. PLAINTIFF, NPC REALTY IS ALSO AWARDED TREBLE DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $12,000. THERE WILL NOT BE ANY STAYS OF JUDGMENT. NO OTHER PARTY OTHER THAN NPC REALTY HAS ANY RIGHT TO POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 1517-20TH AVENUE. PLAINTIFF WILL PREPARE JUDGMENT.
PHOTOCOPY FOR 6 COPY FOR CASE NUMBER 111773. DEFT COPY. FOR DEFENDANT TAI, DANIEL
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NPC REALTY COURT TRIAL SET FOR JAN-06-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 08 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAI, DANIEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1517-20TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO $12,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF NPC REALTY
